description_long: This handbag features a trapezoidal silhouette with a predominantly cream-colored, woven-texture exterior. A striking vertical band with intricate, multicolored floral and paisley embroidery runs down the center, bordered by a deep purple background. The top edge is finished with a black zipper closure, adorned with a white tassel and a small metallic accent. The sides of the bag are slightly tapered, giving it a sleek, modern profile. The overall design is both elegant and functional, suitable for carrying personal items in urban environments. The bag's materials and decorative elements suggest a blend of traditional craftsmanship and contemporary style.
description: A cream woven-texture handbag with a central embroidered floral band, black zipper, and white tassel accent. The design is elegant and modern, blending traditional and contemporary elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full embroidered floral band, cream woven texture, and zipper with tassel.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the slim profile, black zipper, and tassel hanging from the zipper pull.
description_view_2: Back view with the same cream woven texture and central embroidered band, but no visible tassel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlighting the slim profile and zipper, with the tassel visible from a different angle.
attribute_strap_type: Single short side strap, non-adjustable, attached to zipper pull for carrying or hanging.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Zipper closure running along the top edge, with a metallic zipper pull.
attribute_decorative_elements: White tassel attached to zipper pull; central embroidered floral and paisley band.
attribute_pattern: Central vertical embroidered floral and paisley pattern on a purple background; cream woven texture elsewhere.
